'''Clone regimental commander''', or simply '''regimental commander''', was the third highest [[Military rank/Legends|military rank]] that a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] could obtain in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]]. Placed in charge of [[Regiment/Legends|regiments]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] alongside a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]], [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] regimental [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] were distinguished by the yellow markings on their [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]] towards the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. According to the Grand Army's [[Order of Battle/Legends|Order of Battle]], clone regimental commanders were subordinate to [[senior clone commander]]s, while [[clone battalion commander]]s were subordinate to regimental commanders.<ref name="TEGtW" /> [[CRC-09/571]] was a clone regimental commander.<ref name="Shatterpoint">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The rank of clone regimental commander first appeared in [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']], a [[2003]] novel written by [[Matthew Stover]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" />

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
